title: 15pcs Glitter Icicle Christmas Tree Decorations – 8.5cm Baby Pink Droplet Baubles Set, Crystal-Style Icicles for Xmas Trees, Elegant Hanging Ornaments for Indoor Christmas Décor
features: 𝐄𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐂𝐋𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐀 𝐒𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐊𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐄: Add a shimmering finishing touch to your Christmas tree with these 12cm glitter icicles. Designed to reflect light beautifully, they bring a crystal-style sparkle to any festive display.

𝐂𝐑𝐘𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐋-𝐒𝐓𝐘𝐋𝐄 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐑 𝐃𝐑𝐎𝐏𝐋𝐄𝐓 𝐁𝐀𝐔𝐁𝐋𝐄𝐒: Made to resemble real glass icicles, these clear hanging ornaments create a luxurious winter look without the fragility of glass. Perfect for trees, garlands, wreaths and indoor displays.

𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐖𝐄𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 & 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐆: Each icicle comes with an attached string for quick decorating. Lightweight construction helps branches stay upright while still delivering a premium, glass-like decorative effect.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐂𝐇𝐑𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐌𝐀𝐒 𝐃𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐒: Ideal for Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, table centrepieces, wedding décor and seasonal parties. Create a frosty, elegant look that blends effortlessly with classic or modern themes.

𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐑𝐄𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐒𝐄𝐓 𝐎𝐅 𝟏𝟎: Crafted for long-lasting use so you can enjoy them year after year. Includes 10 matching 12cm icicle ornaments — a great set to fill empty tree spaces and enhance your Christmas decoration collection.
